evals.prompt: Replace my @capacitor-mlkit/barcode-scanning continuous scanner with Scandit MatrixScan Batch. Every visible barcode (EAN-13, Code 128, QR) should keep being tracked, deduplicated by value, and accumulated into the on-screen summary list. Here is my scanner: MlkitBatchScanner.js.
evals.expected_output: The skill removes the ML Kit dependency (the @capacitor-mlkit/barcode-scanning import, BarcodeScanner.addListener('barcodesScanned'), BarcodeScanner.startScan/stopScan, and the BarcodeFormat enum) and replaces it with MatrixScan Batch: ScanditCaptureCorePlugin.initializePlugins() first, DataCaptureContext.initialize, Camera setup via BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings() + Camera.withSettings + context.setFrameSource, BarcodeBatchSettings with the mapped symbologies (EAN13UPCA, Code128, QR), new BarcodeBatch(settings) + context.setMode, a didUpdateSession listener, DataCaptureView.forContext + connectToElement, camera on, isEnabled = true. It maps the ML Kit formats to Scandit symbologies and preserves the dedup-and-summary behavior, ideally upgrading the rawValue-based dedupe to tracking-identifier-based dedupe. Shows the setup checklist (packages, npx cap sync, NSCameraUsageDescription).

assertions.text: The import from '@capacitor-mlkit/barcode-scanning' is removed from the code blocks
BarcodeScanner.addListener('barcodesScanned' is not present in the migrated code blocks
BarcodeScanner.startScan( and BarcodeScanner.stopScan( are not present in the migrated code blocks
The ML Kit BarcodeFormat enum is not used in the migrated code blocks
await ScanditCaptureCorePlugin.initializePlugins() is present and awaited before any other Scandit call
DataCaptureContext.initialize( is used to create the context
BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is called
Camera.withSettings( is called and context.setFrameSource( is called
new BarcodeBatchSettings() is present
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.Ean13)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.Code128)
Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.QrCode)
new BarcodeBatch(settings) is present and context.setMode( is called with it
barcodeBatch.addListener( is called with a didUpdateSession callback
DataCaptureView.forContext( and connectToElement( are present
camera.switchToDesiredState(FrameSourceState.On) is called and barcodeBatch.isEnabled = true is set
The dedup-and-accumulate behavior is preserved, keyed either on the tracking identifier or on the barcode data/value (semantic)
The on-screen summary rendering (renderSummary or equivalent list update) is preserved (semantic)
Setup checklist mentions installing scandit-capacitor-datacapture-core and scandit-capacitor-datacapture-barcode
Setup checklist mentions running npx cap sync
Setup checklist mentions iOS Info.plist NSCameraUsageDescription
